name: NHS Bath and North East Somerset, Swindon and Wiltshire ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose referrals accepted. GP referral to approved private providers funded by the NHS.
local_nhs_provider: Avon and Wiltshire Mental Health Partnership NHS Trust

name: NHS Bedfordshire, Luton and Milton Keynes ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose is supported. Contact your GP to request a referral to an approved provider.
local_nhs_provider: East London NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Birmingham and Solihull ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose referrals accepted but some GPs may need guidance. Bring the NHS England guidance letter to your appointment.
local_nhs_provider: Birmingham and Solihull Mental Health NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Black Country ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose is accepted. Your GP can refer you to approved private providers.
local_nhs_provider: Black Country Healthcare NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Bristol, North Somerset and South Gloucestershire ICB
rtc_notes: Actively supports Right to Choose. Several approved private providers available.
local_nhs_provider: Avon and Wiltshire Mental Health Partnership NHS Trust

name: NHS Buckinghamshire, Oxfordshire and Berkshire West ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose supported across the ICB. GP referral required.
local_nhs_provider: Oxford Health NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Cambridgeshire and Peterborough ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose referrals accepted. Some practices more familiar with the process than others.
local_nhs_provider: Cambridgeshire and Peterborough NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Cheshire and Merseyside ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose widely accepted across Cheshire and Merseyside. ADHD Foundation headquartered in Liverpool.
local_nhs_provider: Mersey Care NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Cornwall and the Isles of Scilly ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose accepted. Limited local private providers — many patients use online assessment services.
local_nhs_provider: Cornwall Partnership NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Coventry and Warwickshire ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose supported. GP referral to approved providers available.
local_nhs_provider: Coventry and Warwickshire Partnership NHS Trust

name: NHS Derby and Derbyshire ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose referrals accepted. ADHD waits among the longest in the East Midlands.
local_nhs_provider: Derbyshire Healthcare NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Devon ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose accepted but NHS waiting lists are among the longest in the South West.
local_nhs_provider: Devon Partnership NHS Trust

name: NHS Dorset ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose supported. Dorset Healthcare has been proactive in reducing waits.
local_nhs_provider: Dorset HealthCare University NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Frimley ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose accepted. Several private providers available in the area.
local_nhs_provider: Surrey and Borders Partnership NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Gloucestershire ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose supported. GP referral pathway well-established.
local_nhs_provider: Gloucestershire Health and Care NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Greater Manchester ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose well-established across Greater Manchester. ADHD waits are among the longest nationally, making RTC particularly valuable here.
local_nhs_provider: Greater Manchester Mental Health NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Hampshire and Isle of Wight ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose accepted. Good range of private providers available across Hampshire.
local_nhs_provider: Southern Health NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Herefordshire and Worcestershire ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose supported. Rural location means many patients use online providers.
local_nhs_provider: Herefordshire and Worcestershire Health and Care NHS Trust

name: NHS Hertfordshire and West Essex ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose accepted. Proximity to London provides good access to private providers.
local_nhs_provider: Hertfordshire Partnership University NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Humber and North Yorkshire ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose supported. York and Hull have the best access to local providers.
local_nhs_provider: Humber Teaching NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Kent and Medway ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose accepted. Canterbury, Maidstone, and Tunbridge Wells have good private provider access.
local_nhs_provider: Kent and Medway NHS and Social Care Partnership Trust

name: NHS Lancashire and South Cumbria ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose accepted. Preston and Lancaster have the best local private provider access.
local_nhs_provider: Lancashire and South Cumbria NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Leicester, Leicestershire and Rutland ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose supported. Leicester city has good private provider coverage.
local_nhs_provider: Leicestershire Partnership NHS Trust

name: NHS Lincolnshire ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose accepted. Rural area means online providers are often the most accessible option.
local_nhs_provider: Lincolnshire Partnership NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Mid and South Essex ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose supported. Good access to London-based private providers.
local_nhs_provider: Essex Partnership University NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Norfolk and Waveney ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose accepted. Norwich has the best local private provider access.
local_nhs_provider: Norfolk and Suffolk NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS North Central London ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose well-established in North Central London. Excellent private provider coverage across the boroughs.
local_nhs_provider: Barnet, Enfield and Haringey Mental Health NHS Trust

name: NHS North East London ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose accepted. Some of the longest waits in London — RTC is particularly important here.
local_nhs_provider: East London NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS North East and North Cumbria ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose accepted across the region. Newcastle has the best private provider coverage.
local_nhs_provider: Cumbria, Northumberland, Tyne and Wear NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS North West London ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose well-supported. Excellent access to Harley Street and West London private clinics.
local_nhs_provider: Central and North West London NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Northamptonshire ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose supported. Northampton town has good access to private providers.
local_nhs_provider: Northamptonshire Healthcare NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Nottingham and Nottinghamshire ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose accepted. Nottingham city centre has several private assessment clinics.
local_nhs_provider: Nottinghamshire Healthcare NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Shropshire, Telford and Wrekin ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose supported. Limited local providers — many patients use online assessment services or travel to Birmingham.
local_nhs_provider: Midlands Partnership NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Somerset ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose accepted. Taunton and Yeovil have some local private providers.
local_nhs_provider: Somerset NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS South East London ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose well-supported. Good access to private providers across South East London boroughs.
local_nhs_provider: South London and Maudsley NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS South West London ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose well-established. Excellent private provider coverage.
local_nhs_provider: South West London and St George's Mental Health NHS Trust

name: NHS South Yorkshire ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose accepted. Sheffield has the best access to private providers in the region.
local_nhs_provider: Sheffield Health and Social Care NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Staffordshire and Stoke-on-Trent ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose supported. Some patients travel to Birmingham for wider provider choice.
local_nhs_provider: Midlands Partnership NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Suffolk and North East Essex ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose accepted. Ipswich and Colchester have some local private providers.
local_nhs_provider: Norfolk and Suffolk NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Surrey Heartlands ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose well-supported. Excellent access to London and Surrey private clinics.
local_nhs_provider: Surrey and Borders Partnership NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Sussex ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose accepted. Brighton has good private provider coverage.
local_nhs_provider: Sussex Partnership NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS West Yorkshire ICB
rtc_notes: Right to Choose accepted but waits are very long. Leeds has the best local private provider access.
local_nhs_provider: Leeds and York Partnership NHS Foundation Trust

name: NHS Scotland
rtc_notes: Right to Choose does not apply in Scotland. However, you can access private assessment independently. Some NHS boards have shorter waiting times than England.
local_nhs_provider: Various NHS Health Boards

name: NHS Wales
rtc_notes: Right to Choose does not apply in Wales. The Welsh Government has its own neurodevelopmental pathway. Private assessment is available independently.
local_nhs_provider: Various Welsh Health Boards

name: HSC Northern Ireland
rtc_notes: Right to Choose does not apply in Northern Ireland. HSC waiting lists are among the longest in the UK. Private assessment is available as an alternative.
local_nhs_provider: Health and Social Care Trusts
